Title: Ghost Hunter
Obituary
True or False
You See Dead People?
Confirmation Needed
Final Goodbye
Last Steps
Description:
A bit of backstory on this one. Some random scav has been going around claiming that they offed a big time hitter by the name of [TargetName]. Claims that they caught [TargetName|NickOrFirst] right in the middle of pulling a job. Now the thing is, if [TargetName|NickOrFirst] is really dead... well... that creates complications for the [Client]. 

Anyway, after some careful negotiations from yours truly, they've coughed up some creds to pay for someone to go out and verify that [TargetName|Last] is actually dead. [Timed]You will just need to go to [Location], find the body and confirm. [Danger]

Here's a bit of dreadful business to throw your way. [Client] had a recent op that apparently turned into a total shitshow. Mayhem and carnage to the nth degree. Anyway, the rumor was that [TargetName] got clipped in the exchange, but now people are saying that the bastard's still alive. 

Anyway, the [Client] need to know one way or the other. That's why I'm having you go out to [Location] and confirm that they're a corpsicle. Once you get the ID, you get paid. [Danger]Pretty simple, right? [Timed]

Everyone's been talking about [TargetName] recently. The [Client] have been saying that they were killed a few days ago in the middle of pulling a job for them, but... well, let's just say that they're a less than accurate source of information. Anyway, I've got a client who's eager to prove them wrong, so they're shelling out some creds to get a positive id on the body. I'll hook you up with the  [Location]. You have a look and tell me if you find them. [Timed][Danger]

Got a simple, but kinda disgusting job here. In a recent raid, [TargetName]'s ticket got punched and I guess the [Client] want some proof of old [TargetName|NickOrFirst]'s remains for... something. I honestly don't know why. Maybe they're worried that the bastard is playing dead just to steal from them. Anyway, they gave me the  [Location] and are paying for someone to go out and confirm the kill. [Timed][Danger]

The [Client] hired a hitter to take out a rival who's been poaching on their turf, but between you and me, I guess they didn't really get their credits worth because the guy forgot to provide proof that [TargetName] was actually dead. Anyway, I told them I could provide that, and by that, I mean you could provide it. All you gotta do is go to  [Location] and confirm that [TargetName|NickOrFirst]'s touching void. [Danger]Once I get confirmation, you get paid. [Timed]
Danger: Of course, if the bastard is still alive then ... well, let's just say you should go in ready for anything.
Watch your back when you're digging around. They say violence makes more violence.
Make sure to keep an eye out for trouble while you're searching. Hate to hear that you joined [TargetName|NickOrFirst] cause you weren't careful.
Timed: Need you to hurry and get there fast. No telling what can happen to a corpse when it's just left sitting out there.
And just cause they're dead doesn't mean you can take you're sweet time. The longer [TargetName|NickOrFirst] sits out there, the harder this job's gonna get.
Everyone's real eager to have this settled as fast as possible, so see what you can do.
Even the thought of [TargetName|Last] still breathing has everyone on edge. Take care of this ASAP.
